- 20: const FULL_CLOSEFLOW_HTML = "<!doctype html>\n<html lang=\"pl\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"utf-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\" />\n  <title>CloseFlow - pełny kierunek UI</title>\n  <style>\n    :root {\n      --bg: #f4f6f8;\n      --bg-2: #eef2f6;\n      --sidebar: #101828;\n      --sidebar-2: #172033;\n      --card: #ffffff;\n      --card-soft: #f8fafc;\n      --text: #111827;\n      --muted: #667085;\n      --muted-2: #98a2b3;\n      --line: #e4e7ec;\n      --line-2: #d0d5dd;\n      --blue: #2563eb;\n      --blue-2: #1d4ed8;\n      --blue-soft: #eff6ff;\n      --green: #047857;\n      --green-soft: #ecfdf3;\n      --red: #b42318;\n      --red-soft: #fff1f3;\n      --amber: #b54708;\n      --amber-soft: #fffaeb;\n      --violet: #6941c6;\n      --violet-soft: #f4f3ff;\n      --shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(16, 24, 40, .08);\n      --shadow-soft: 0 8px 22px rgba(16, 24, 40, .05);\n      --radius-xl: 28px;\n      --radius-lg: 20px;\n      --radius-md: 14px;\n    }\n\n    * { box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n    body {\n      margin: 0;\n      min-height: 100vh;\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(circle at 16% 0%, rgba(37, 99, 235, .10), transparent 28%),\n        radial-gradient(circle at 95% 7%, rgba(16, 24, 40, .08), transparent 26%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f9fc 0%, var(--bg) 34%, #eef2f6 100%);\n      color: var(--text);\n      font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n      font-size: 14px;\n    }\n\n    button,\n    input,\n    textarea,\n    select {\n      font: inherit;\n    }\n\n    a {\n      color: inherit;\n      text-decoration: none;\n    }\n\n    .app {\n      min-height: 100vh;\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 286px minmax(0, 1fr);\n    }\n\n    .sidebar {\n      position: sticky;\n      top: 0;\n      height: 100vh;\n      padding: 18px;\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(37, 99, 235, .26), transparent 35%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--sidebar) 0%, #0b1220 100%);\n      color: #fff;\n      display: flex;\n      flex-direction: column;\n      gap: 16px;\n      z-index: 10;\n      box-shadow: 18px 0 45px rgba(16, 24, 40, .16);\n    }\n\n    .brand {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 12px;\n      padding: 8px 8px 14px;\n      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n    }\n\n    .brand-logo {\n      width: 44px;\n      height: 44px;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      border-radius: 16px;\n      background: #fff;\n      color: #0f172a;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: -.05em;\n      box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.24);\n    }\n\n    .brand-title {\n      min-width: 0;\n    }\n\n    .brand-title strong {\n      display: block;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      letter-spacing: -.04em;\n    }\n\n    .brand-title span {\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 2px;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.54);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n    }\n\n    .nav-scroll {\n      overflow: auto;\n      padding-right: 2px;\n      flex: 1;\n    }\n\n    .nav-group {\n      margin-top: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .nav-group:first-child {\n      margin-top: 0;\n    }\n\n    .nav-caption {\n      padding: 0 10px 7px;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.38);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn {\n      width: 100%;\n      min-height: 43px;\n      border: 0;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      background: transparent;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.68);\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      padding: 0 11px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-size: 13px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n      transition: .16s ease;\n      text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn:hover {\n      color: #fff;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn.active {\n      color: #fff;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);\n      box-shadow:\n        inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.10),\n        0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.16);\n    }\n\n    .nav-ico {\n      width: 28px;\n      height: 28px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.07);\n      font-size: 14px;\n      flex: 0 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn.active .nav-ico {\n      background: #fff;\n      color: #0f172a;\n    }\n\n    .nav-badge {\n      margin-left: auto;\n      min-width: 22px;\n      height: 20px;\n      padding: 0 7px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.10);\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.7);\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n    }\n\n    .sidebar-footer {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 10px;\n      padding-top: 12px;\n      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n    }\n\n    .trial-card {\n      padding: 12px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);\n    }\n\n    .trial-card .top {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 10px;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.75);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .06em;\n    }\n\n    .bar {\n      height: 7px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);\n      margin-top: 10px;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .bar span {\n      display: block;\n      height: 100%;\n      border-radius: inherit;\n      background: #60a5fa;\n    }\n\n    .user-card {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      padding: 9px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.06);\n    }\n\n    .user-avatar {\n      width: 38px;\n      height: 38px;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .user-card strong {\n      display: block;\n      font-size: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .user-card span {\n      display: block;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.5);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      margin-top: 2px;\n    }\n\n    .main {\n      min-width: 0;\n      padding: 24px 28px 48px;\n    }\n\n    .global-bar {\n      position: sticky;\n      top: 0;\n      z-index: 8;\n      margin: -24px -28px 22px;\n      padding: 13px 28px;\n      background: rgba(247, 249, 252, .86);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(228, 231, 236, .78);\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .global-title {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      min-width: 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n    }\n\n    .global-title strong {\n      color: var(--text);\n    }\n\n    .global-actions {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: flex-end;\n      gap: 8px;\n      overflow-x: auto;\n      padding-bottom: 1px;\n    }\n\n    .view {\n      display: none;\n      max-width: 1500px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .view.active {\n      display: block;\n      animation: fade .16s ease-out;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes fade {\n      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); }\n      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n    }\n\n    .page-head {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 22px;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .kicker {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 7px;\n      padding: 5px 9px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.72);\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n    }\n\n    h1 {\n      margin: 8px 0 0;\n      font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 42px);\n      line-height: 1;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .lead-copy {\n      margin: 8px 0 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      max-width: 780px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n      font-size: 13px;\n    }\n\n    .head-actions {\n      display: flex;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      justify-content: flex-end;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .btn {\n      min-height: 40px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card);\n      color: var(--text);\n      border-radius: 13px;\n      padding: 0 14px;\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      gap: 7px;\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      transition: .15s ease;\n      white-space: nowrap;\n    }\n\n    .btn:hover {\n      transform: translateY(-1px);\n      border-color: var(--line-2);\n    }\n\n    .btn.primary {\n      background: var(--blue);\n      border-color: var(--blue);\n      color: #fff;\n      box-shadow: 0 13px 26px rgba(37, 99, 235, .23);\n    }\n\n    .btn.dark {\n      background: var(--sidebar);\n      border-color: var(--sidebar);\n      color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .btn.ghost {\n      box-shadow: none;\n      background: transparent;\n    }\n\n    .btn.soft-blue {\n      color: var(--blue-2);\n      background: var(--blue-soft);\n      border-color: #bfdbfe;\n      box-shadow: none;\n    }\n\n    .btn.soft-red {\n      color: var(--red);\n      background: var(--red-soft);\n      border-color: #fecdd3;\n      box-shadow: none;\n    }\n\n    .grid-4 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 13px;\n    }\n\n    .grid-5 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 13px;\n    }\n\n    .metric {\n      min-height: 106px;\n      border-radius: 22px;\n      padding: 16px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.82);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      display: grid;\n      align-content: space-between;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      transition: .16s ease;\n    }\n\n    .metric:hover {\n      transform: translateY(-2px);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    }\n\n    .metric.active {\n      background: var(--blue-soft);\n      border-color: #93c5fd;\n    }\n\n    .metric label {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n    }\n\n    .metric strong {\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 7px;\n      font-size: 25px;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n      line-height: 1;\n    }\n\n    .metric .hint {\n      margin-top: 5px;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      line-height: 1.3;\n    }\n\n    .card {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .card.pad {\n      padding: 18px;\n    }\n\n    .panel-head {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 12px;\n      margin-bottom: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .panel-head h2,\n    .panel-head h3 {\n      margin: 0;\n      font-size: 15px;\n      letter-spacing: -.03em;\n    }\n\n    .panel-head p {\n      margin: 4px 0 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      line-height: 1.4;\n    }\n\n    .layout-list {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 315px;\n      gap: 17px;\n      align-items: start;\n      margin-top: 17px;\n    }\n\n    .layout-detail {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 300px minmax(0, 1fr) 315px;\n      gap: 17px;\n      align-items: start;\n      margin-top: 17px;\n    }\n\n    .stack {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .search {\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .search input {\n      width: 100%;\n      height: 50px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      outline: none;\n      padding: 0 16px 0 42px;\n      color: var(--text);\n      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.7);\n    }\n\n    .search span {\n      position: absolute;\n      left: 16px;\n      top: 50%;\n      transform: translateY(-50%);\n      color: var(--muted-2);\n      font-size: 15px;\n    }\n\n    .table-card {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.84);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .row {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 34px minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(130px, .45fr) minmax(180px, .7fr) 40px;\n      gap: 12px;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding: 13px 14px;\n      border-top: 1px solid var(--line);\n      transition: .15s ease;\n    }\n\n    .row:first-child {\n      border-top: 0;\n    }\n\n    .row:hover {\n      background: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .row.slim {\n      grid-template-columns: 34px minmax(0, 1fr) 140px 120px;\n    }\n\n    .index {\n      width: 28px;\n      height: 28px;\n      border-radius: 11px;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      background: #f2f4f7;\n      color: #667085;\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n    }\n\n    .title {\n      color: var(--text);\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: -.025em;\n      line-height: 1.2;\n    }\n\n    .sub {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      margin-top: 4px;\n      line-height: 1.35;\n    }\n\n    .mini {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n    }\n\n    .pill {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 5px;\n      height: 24px;\n      padding: 0 9px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      background: #f2f4f7;\n      color: #475467;\n      white-space: nowrap;\n      border: 1px solid transparent;\n    }\n\n    .pill.blue { background: var(--blue-soft); color: var(--blue-2); border-color: #bfdbfe; }\n    .pill.green { background: var(--green-soft); color: var(--green); border-color: #bbf7d0; }\n    .pill.red { background: var(--red-soft); color: var(--red); border-color: #fecdd3; }\n    .pill.amber { background: var(--amber-soft); color: var(--amber); border-color: #fedf89; }\n    .pill.violet { background: var(--violet-soft); color: var(--violet); border-color: #ddd6fe; }\n    .pill.dark { background: var(--sidebar); color: #fff; }\n\n    .statusline {\n      display: flex;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      gap: 6px;\n      margin-top: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .person-card {\n      padding: 18px;\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 15px;\n    }\n\n    .avatar-line {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .avatar {\n      width: 54px;\n      height: 54px;\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      background: var(--sidebar);\n      color: #fff;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: -.05em;\n      box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(16, 24, 40, .18);\n    }\n\n    .avatar.blue {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1d4ed8, #60a5fa);\n    }\n\n    .avatar.green {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #047857, #34d399);\n    }\n\n    .avatar.violet {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5b21b6, #a78bfa);\n    }\n\n    .avatar-line h2 {\n      margin: 0;\n      font-size: 18px;\n      letter-spacing: -.04em;\n    }\n\n    .avatar-line p {\n      margin: 3px 0 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      line-height: 1.35;\n    }\n\n    .kv {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .kv-row {\n      padding: 11px 12px;\n      border-radius: 15px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .kv-row label {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .07em;\n      font-weight: 950;\n    }\n\n    .kv-row strong {\n      color: var(--text);\n      font-size: 13px;\n      word-break: break-word;\n    }\n\n    .hero-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(240px, .65fr);\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .hero {\n      min-height: 156px;\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      padding: 18px;\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #111827, #1d2939);\n      color: #fff;\n      display: grid;\n      align-content: space-between;\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    }\n\n    .hero.light {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      color: var(--text);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n    }\n\n    .hero label {\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.62);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n    }\n\n    .hero.light label {\n      color: var(--muted);\n    }\n\n    .hero h2 {\n      margin: 8px 0 6px;\n      font-size: 27px;\n      line-height: 1.05;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .hero p {\n      margin: 0;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.72);\n      font-size: 13px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n    }\n\n    .hero.light p {\n      color: var(--muted);\n    }\n\n    .tabs {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 6px;\n      padding: 6px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      background: rgba(248,250,252,.86);\n      width: fit-content;\n    }\n\n    .tabs button {\n      border: 0;\n      background: transparent;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      border-radius: 12px;\n      padding: 9px 13px;\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      cursor: pointer;\n    }\n\n    .tabs button.active {\n      background: #fff;\n      color: var(--text);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n    }\n\n    .work-card {\n      padding: 14px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 9px;\n    }\n\n    .work-head {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 12px;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n    }\n\n    .progress {\n      height: 9px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: #e4e7ec;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .progress span {\n      display: block;\n      height: 100%;\n      border-radius: inherit;\n      background: var(--blue);\n    }\n\n    .right-card {\n      padding: 16px;\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n    }\n\n    .quick-list {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .quick-list button,\n    .quick-list a {\n      min-height: 40px;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: #fff;\n      color: #344054;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      padding: 0 12px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      transition: .15s ease;\n    }\n\n    .quick-list button:hover,\n    .quick-list a:hover {\n      border-color: #bfdbfe;\n      background: var(--blue-soft);\n      color: var(--blue-2);\n    }\n\n    .note {\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      padding: 14px;\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border: 1px dashed var(--line-2);\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n    }\n\n    .mini-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .mini-card {\n      min-height: 108px;\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      padding: 14px;\n      display: grid;\n      align-content: space-between;\n    }\n\n    .mini-card strong {\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 8px;\n      font-size: 23px;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .calendar-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 260px minmax(0, 1fr);\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .month-list {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .day-card {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);\n      gap: 12px;\n      padding: 12px;\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      margin-top: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .day {\n      height: 58px;\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      background: #fff;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      color: var(--text);\n      text-align: center;\n      line-height: 1.1;\n    }\n\n    .settings-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .switch-row {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 12px;\n      padding: 13px;\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      margin-top: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .switch {\n      width: 42px;\n      height: 24px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: var(--blue);\n      position: relative;\n      flex: 0 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .switch::after {\n      content: \"\";\n      width: 18px;\n      height: 18px;\n      background: #fff;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      position: absolute;\n      right: 3px;\n      top: 3px;\n      box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.18);\n    }\n\n    .drawer-backdrop {\n      position: fixed;\n      inset: 0;\n      background: rgba(16, 24, 40, .44);\n      display: none;\n      z-index: 50;\n    }\n\n    .drawer-backdrop.open {\n      display: block;\n    }\n\n    .drawer {\n      position: fixed;\n      top: 0;\n      right: 0;\n      width: min(480px, 100vw);\n      height: 100vh;\n      background: #fff;\n      border-left: 1px solid var(--line);\n      box-shadow: -28px 0 90px rgba(16,24,40,.28);\n      transform: translateX(102%);\n      transition: .2s ease;\n      z-index: 51;\n      padding: 22px;\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;\n      gap: 16px;\n    }\n\n    .drawer.open {\n      transform: translateX(0);\n    }\n\n    .drawer h2 {\n      margin: 0;\n      font-size: 24px;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .drawer textarea {\n      width: 100%;\n      min-height: 180px;\n      resize: vertical;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      padding: 14px;\n      outline: none;\n      color: var(--text);\n    }\n\n    .suggestions {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n      margin-top: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .suggestions button {\n      text-align: left;\n      min-height: 40px;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      color: #344054;\n      padding: 10px 12px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-size: 13px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n    }\n\n    .mobile-top {\n      display: none;\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 1220px) {\n      .app {\n        grid-template-columns: 86px minmax(0,1fr);\n      }\n\n      .sidebar {\n        padding: 14px 10px;\n      }\n\n      .brand-title,\n      .nav-caption,\n      .nav-label,\n      .nav-badge,\n      .sidebar-footer {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .brand {\n        justify-content: center;\n        padding: 8px 0 14px;\n      }\n\n      .nav-btn {\n        justify-content: center;\n        padding: 0;\n      }\n\n      .nav-ico {\n        width: 38px;\n        height: 38px;\n      }\n\n      .layout-detail,\n      .layout-list {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n\n      .grid-5 {\n        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      }\n\n      .grid-4 {\n        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      }\n\n      .calendar-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 760px) {\n      .app {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n\n      .sidebar {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .mobile-top {\n        display: flex;\n        position: sticky;\n        top: 0;\n        z-index: 15;\n        align-items: center;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        padding: 12px 14px;\n        background: rgba(255,255,255,.9);\n        backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);\n      }\n\n      .main {\n        padding: 0 14px 94px;\n      }\n\n      .global-bar {\n        top: 0;\n        margin: 0 -14px 16px;\n        padding: 10px 14px;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n      }\n\n      .global-title {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .page-head {\n        flex-direction: column;\n        gap: 12px;\n      }\n\n      .head-actions {\n        justify-content: flex-start;\n        width: 100%;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n      }\n\n      h1 {\n        font-size: 29px;\n      }\n\n      .grid-5,\n      .grid-4,\n      .mini-grid,\n      .settings-grid,\n      .hero-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n\n      .row,\n      .row.slim {\n        grid-template-columns: 30px minmax(0, 1fr);\n      }\n\n      .row > :nth-child(n+4),\n      .row.slim > :nth-child(n+4) {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .tabs {\n        width: 100%;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n      }\n\n      .mobile-nav {\n        position: fixed;\n        bottom: 0;\n        inset-inline: 0;\n        z-index: 30;\n        display: grid;\n        grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);\n        gap: 4px;\n        padding: 8px;\n        background: rgba(255,255,255,.95);\n        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);\n        backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n      }\n\n      .mobile-nav button {\n        border: 0;\n        border-radius: 13px;\n        background: transparent;\n        padding: 8px 4px;\n        color: var(--muted);\n        font-size: 10px;\n        font-weight: 900;\n        display: grid;\n        gap: 3px;\n        place-items: center;\n      }\n\n      .mobile-nav button.active {\n        background: var(--blue-soft);\n        color: var(--blue-2);\n      }\n    }\n\n    @media (min-width: 761px) {\n      .mobile-nav {\n        display: none;\n      }\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"mobile-top\">\n    <strong>CloseFlow</strong>\n    <button class=\"btn Czytelny, ale drugorzędny.</p></div>\n          <div class=\"head-actions\"><button class=\"btn soft-blue ai-open\" data-context=\"activity\">✦ Szukaj w aktywności</button></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"layout-list\">\n          <div class=\"card pad stack\">\n            <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Zmieniono status zadania</div><div class=\"sub\">Ty · dzisiaj 20:56 · sprawa Alfred Panek</div></div><span class=\"pill\">Historia</span></div></div>\n            <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Dodano notatkę do leada</div><div class=\"sub\">Ty · dzisiaj 18:13 · Pytał o gnojnik</div></div><span class=\"pill blue\">Lead</span></div></div>\n            <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Utworzono sprawę</div><div class=\"sub\">System · wczoraj · Alfred Panek - obsługa</div></div><span class=\"pill green\">Sprawa</span></div></div>\n          </div>\n          <aside class=\"right-card\"><div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h3>Filtry</h3><p>Po typie zdarzenia.</p></div></div><div class=\"quick-list\"><button>Leady <span>12</span></button><button>Sprawy <span>8</span></button><button>Zadania <span>21</span></button><button>AI <span>3</span></button></div></aside>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      <section id=\"ai-drafts\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"page-head\">\n          <div><span class=\"kicker\">Do zatwierdzenia</span><h1>Szkice AI</h1><p class=\"lead-copy\">AI nie zapisuje finalnie. Wszystko trafia tutaj jako szkic do sprawdzenia, poprawy i zatwierdzenia.</p></div>\n          <div class=\"head-actions\"><button class=\"btn soft-blue ai-open\" data-context=\"drafts\">✦ Zapytaj AI</button></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"grid-4\">\n          <div class=\"metric active\"><label>Nowe</label><strong>3</strong><div class=\"hint\">do sprawdzenia</div></div>\n          <div class=\"metric\"><label>Leady</label><strong>1</strong><div class=\"hint\">nowe kontakty</div></div>\n          <div class=\"metric\"><label>Zadania</label><strong>1</strong><div class=\"hint\">z głosu</div></div>\n          <div class=\"metric\"><label>Notatki</label><strong>1</strong><div class=\"hint\">do przypięcia</div></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"card pad stack\" style=\"margin-top:17px\">\n          <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Zapisz zadanie: wysłać papiery</div><div class=\"sub\">Źródło: szybki szkic głosowy · wymaga potwierdzenia przed zapisem.</div></div><span class=\"pill amber\">Do zatwierdzenia</span></div><div class=\"statusline\"><button class=\"btn primary\">Zatwierdź</button><button class=\"btn\">Popraw</button><button class=\"btn soft-red\">Odrzuć</button></div></div>\n          <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Nowy lead z rozmowy</div><div class=\"sub\">Brakuje telefonu. AI ma prosić o uzupełnienie, nie zgadywać.</div></div><span class=\"pill blue\">Lead</span></div></div>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      <section id=\"notifications\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"page-head\">\n          <div><span class=\"kicker\">Centrum powiadomień</span><h1>Powiadomienia</h1><p class=\"lead-copy\">Prosty widok: co przyszło, czego dotyczy i czy wymaga reakcji.</p></div>\n          <div class=\"head-actions\"><button class=\"btn\">Oznacz jako przeczytane</button></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"card pad stack\">\n          <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Dzienny digest gotowy do wysyłki</div><div class=\"sub\">Rano użytkownik dostaje plan dnia.</div></div><span class=\"pill blue\">Email</span></div></div>\n          <div class=\"work-card\"><div class=\"work-head\"><div><div class=\"title\">Zaległe zadanie</div><div class=\"sub\">Pobrać 3500 dla panka.</div></div><span class=\"pill red\">Pilne</span></div></div>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      <section id=\"billing\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"page-head\">\n          <div><span class=\"kicker\">Dostęp i płatności</span><h1>Rozliczenia</h1><p class=\"lead-copy\">Ten widok ma być prosty: jaki plan, ile dni triala, co jest zablokowane i jak zapłacić.</p></div>\n          <div class=\"head-actions\"><button class=\"btn primary\">Aktywuj plan</button></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"settings-grid\">\n          <div class=\"card pad\"><div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h2>Trial</h2><p>Aktywny jeszcze 7 dni.</p></div><span class=\"pill blue\">Aktywny</span></div><div class=\"bar\" style=\"background:#e4e7ec\"><span style=\"width:58%\"></span></div></div>\n          <div class=\"card pad\"><div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h2>Plan Pro</h2><p>Pełny dostęp do AI, digestów i automatyzacji.</p></div></div><button class=\"btn primary\">Przejdź do płatności</button></div>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      <section id=\"help\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"page-head\">\n          <div><span class=\"kicker\">Pomoc</span><h1>Centrum pomocy</h1><p class=\"lead-copy\">Szybkie odpowiedzi i kontakt. Bez ściany dokumentacji.</p></div>\n          <div class=\"head-actions\"><button class=\"btn soft-blue ai-open\" data-context=\"help\">✦ Zapytaj pomoc AI</button></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"settings-grid\">\n          <div class=\"card pad\"><div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h2>Jak działa ścieżka?</h2><p>Lead → klient → sprawa → zadania i wydarzenia.</p></div></div><button class=\"btn\">Otwórz instrukcję</button></div>\n          <div class=\"card pad\"><div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h2>Kontakt z pomocą</h2><p>Zgłoszenia, błędy i pytania.</p></div></div><button class=\"btn primary\">Napisz do nas</button></div>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      <section id=\"settings\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"page-head\">\n          <div><span class=\"kicker\">Konfiguracja</span><h1>Ustawienia</h1><p class=\"lead-copy\">Ustawienia powinny być spokojne i pogrupowane. Użytkownik nie ma tu pracować codziennie.</p></div>\n          <div class=\"head-actions\"><button class=\"btn\">Zapisz zmiany</button></div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"settings-grid\">\n          <div class=\"card pad\">\n            <div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h2>Konto</h2><p>Dane użytkownika i workspace.</p></div></div>\n            <div class=\"switch-row\"><div><div class=\"title\">Digest poranny</div><div class=\"sub\">Wyślij plan dnia rano.</div></div><div class=\"switch\"></div></div>\n            <div class=\"switch-row\"><div><div class=\"title\">Powiadomienia email</div><div class=\"sub\">Terminy i zaległe rzeczy.</div></div><div class=\"switch\"></div></div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"card pad\">\n            <div class=\"panel-head\"><div><h2>AI</h2><p>AI zapisuje tylko do szkiców i czeka na zatwierdzenie.</p></div></div>\n            <div class=\"switch-row\"><div><div class=\"title\">Szkice AI</div><div class=\"sub\">Zapis roboczy przed finalnym dodaniem.</div></div><div class=\"switch\"></div></div>\n            <div class=\"switch-row\"><div><div class=\"title\">AI w całej aplikacji</div><div class=\"sub\">Jeden przycisk, pełny kontekst.</div></div><div class=\"switch\"></div></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  </div>\n\n  <nav class=\"mobile-nav\">\n    <button class=\"active\" data-view=\"today\">⌂<span>Dziś</span></button>\n    <button data-view=\"leads\">◎<span>Leady</span></button>\n    <button data-view=\"clients\">◍<span>Klienci</span></button>\n    <button data-view=\"cases\">▦<span>Sprawy</span></button>\n    <button data-view=\"tasks\">✓<span>Zadania</span></button>\n  </nav>\n\n  <div class=\"drawer-backdrop\" id=\"drawerBackdrop\"></div>\n  <aside class=\"drawer\" id=\"aiDrawer\" aria-label=\"Szuflada AI\">\n    <div class=\"page-head\" style=\"margin:0;align-items:center\">\n      <div>\n        <span class=\"kicker\">AI kontekstowe</span>\n        <h2 id=\"drawerTitle\">Zapytaj AI</h2>\n      </div>\n      <button class=\"btn\" id=\"drawerClose\">✕</button>\n    </div>\n    <div>\n      <textarea id=\"aiPrompt\" placeholder=\"Napisz pytanie albo wybierz gotową podpowiedź...\"></textarea>\n      <div class=\"suggestions\" id=\"suggestions\"></div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"head-actions\">\n      <button class=\"btn\">Zapisz jako szkic</button>\n      <button class=\"btn primary\">Wyślij pytanie</button>\n    </div>\n  </aside>\n\n  <script>\n    const allButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-view]'));\n    const views = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.view'));\n\n    function showView(id) {\n      views.forEach(view => view.classList.toggle('active', view.id === id));\n      allButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === id));\n      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });\n    }\n\n    allButtons.forEach(btn => {\n      btn.addEventListener('click', () => showView(btn.dataset.view));\n    });\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-jump]').forEach(el => {\n      el.addEventListener('click', event => {\n        event.preventDefault();\n        showView(el.dataset.jump);\n      });\n    });\n\n    const drawer = document.getElementById('aiDrawer');\n    const backdrop = document.getElementById('drawerBackdrop');\n    const close = document.getElementById('drawerClose');\n    const title = document.getElementById('drawerTitle');\n    const prompt = document.getElementById('aiPrompt');\n    const suggestions = document.getElementById('suggestions');\n\n    const titleMap = {\n      global: 'Zapytaj AI w aplikacji',\n      today: 'Zapytaj AI o dzień',\n      leads: 'Zapytaj AI o leady',\n      lead: 'Zapytaj AI o tego leada',\n      clients: 'Zapytaj AI o klientów',\n      client: 'Zapytaj AI o klienta',\n      cases: 'Zapytaj AI o sprawy',\n      case: 'Zapytaj AI o sprawę',\n      tasks: 'Zapytaj AI o zadania',\n      calendar: 'Zapytaj AI o kalendarz',\n      activity: 'Szukaj w aktywności',\n      drafts: 'Zapytaj o szkice AI',\n      help: 'Pomoc AI'\n    };\n\n    const suggestionMap = {\n      global: ['Co mam teraz zrobić najpierw?', 'Znajdź telefon klienta Alfred Panek.', 'Pokaż rzeczy bez następnego kroku.', 'Zapisz szkic zadania z tego tekstu.'],\n      today: ['Co jest dziś najpilniejsze?', 'Pokaż zaległe zadania.', 'Które sprawy stoją bez ruchu?', 'Ułóż plan dnia w kolejności.'],\n      leads: ['Które leady są bez działania?', 'Pokaż najbardziej wartościowe relacje.', 'Który lead wymaga reakcji?', 'Napisz follow-up do wybranego leada.'],\n      lead: ['Co powinienem zrobić dalej z tym leadem?', 'Napisz krótką odpowiedź.', 'Czy warto przenieść do obsługi?', 'Zaproponuj następne zadanie.'],\n      clients: ['Którzy klienci nie mają aktywnej sprawy?', 'Znajdź klientów bez ruchu.', 'Pokaż klientów z największą wartością.', 'Podsumuj relacje.'],\n      client: ['Podsumuj historię klienta.', 'Znajdź ostatnie ustalenia.', 'Czy klient ma aktywne blokery?', 'Wypisz powiązane sprawy i leady.'],\n      cases: ['Które sprawy stoją?', 'Pokaż sprawy czekające na klienta.', 'Która sprawa wymaga akcji?', 'Podsumuj aktywne sprawy.'],\n      case: ['Co blokuje tę sprawę?', 'Podsumuj sprawę w 5 punktach.', 'Napisz wiadomość do klienta o brakach.', 'Jaki jest następny najlepszy ruch?'],\n      tasks: ['Pokaż zadania zaległe.', 'Ułóż zadania według priorytetu.', 'Które zadania są bez terminu?', 'Dodaj zadanie z opisu.'],\n      calendar: ['Co mam w tym tygodniu?', 'Pokaż wolne okna.', 'Które wydarzenia są powiązane ze sprawami?', 'Przesuń wydarzenie na jutro.'],\n      activity: ['Znajdź ostatnie zmiany w sprawie Alfreda.', 'Pokaż aktywność AI.', 'Co zmieniło się dziś?', 'Znajdź usunięte zadania.'],\n      drafts: ['Które szkice wymagają decyzji?', 'Popraw ten szkic.', 'Zamień szkic na zadanie.', 'Odrzuć szkice bez danych.'],\n      help: ['Jak działa ścieżka lead klient sprawa?', 'Jak dodać zadanie z głosu?', 'Jak działa AI bez automatycznego zapisu?', 'Jak uruchomić digest?']\n    };\n\n    function openDrawer(context) {\n      title.textContent = titleMap[context] || 'Zapytaj AI';\n      prompt.value = '';\n      suggestions.innerHTML = '';\n      (suggestionMap[context] || suggestionMap.global).forEach(text => {\n        const btn = document.createElement('button');\n        btn.textContent = text;\n        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n          prompt.value = text;\n          prompt.focus();\n        });\n        suggestions.appendChild(btn);\n      });\n      drawer.classList.add('open');\n      backdrop.classList.add('open');\n    }\n\n    function closeDrawer() {\n      drawer.classList.remove('open');\n      backdrop.classList.remove('open');\n    }\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('.ai-open').forEach(btn => {\n      btn.addEventListener('click', () => openDrawer(btn.dataset.context || 'global'));\n    });\n\n    close.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);\n    backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);\n    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {\n      if (e.key === 'Escape') closeDrawer();\n    });\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n";

- 12: - Stage157 emulates browser page zoom: logical layout width = viewport / zoom.
- 18: /* Source truth: app should render like browser zoom 80%.
- 20: 0.82 = a little bigger
- 21: 0.80 = browser 80%
- 24: --cf157-page-zoom: 0.80;
- 28: 100vw / 0.80 = 125vw logical width, rendered back to 100vw visually. */

- 8: .cfv-layout{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:286px minmax(0,1fr)}.cfv-sidebar{position:sticky;top:0;height:100vh;padding:18px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--cfv-sidebar) 0%,#000 100%);border-right:1px solid var(--cfv-line);box-shadow:18px 0 55px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.cfv-main{min-width:0;padding:24px 28px 48px}.cfv-global-bar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:8;margin:-24px -28px 22px;padding:13px 28px;background:rgba(5,6,7,.88);border-bottom:1px solid var(--cfv-line);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px}.cfv-page-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:22px;margin-bottom:20px}.cfv-kicker{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:5px 9px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);background:var(--cfv-card-soft);color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:10px;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em}.cfv-title{margin:8px 0 0;font-size:clamp(28px,3vw,42px);line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.06em;color:var(--cfv-text)}.cfv-lead{margin:8px 0 0;color:var(--cfv-muted);max-width:780px;line-height:1.45;font-size:13px}.cfv-actions{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px}.cfv-btn{min-height:40px;border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);background:var(--cfv-card-soft);color:var(--cfv-text);border-radius:13px;padding:0 14px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:7px;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:var(--cfv-shadow-soft);white-space:nowrap}.cfv-btn-primary{background:var(--cfv-accent);border-color:var(--cfv-accent);color:#02100a;box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(45,213,138,.22)}.cfv-btn-soft{background:var(--cfv-accent-soft);border-color:var(--cfv-accent-2);color:#d8fff1;box-shadow:none}.cfv-grid-5{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr));gap:13px}.cfv-layout-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 315px;gap:17px;align-items:start;margin-top:17px}.cfv-layout-detail{display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px minmax(0,1fr) 315px;gap:17px;align-items:start;margin-top:17px}.cfv-stack{display:grid;gap:14px}.cfv-card{background:rgba(16,20,18,.9);border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);border-radius:var(--cfv-radius-xl);box-shadow:var(--cfv-shadow-soft);overflow:hidden;color:var(--cfv-text)}.cfv-card-pad{padding:18px}.cfv-metric{min-height:106px;border-radius:22px;padding:16px;background:rgba(16,20,18,.9);border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);box-shadow:var(--cfv-shadow-soft);display:grid;align-content:space-between}.cfv-metric-active{background:var(--cfv-accent-soft);border-color:var(--cfv-accent-2)}.cfv-metric label{color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:10px;font-weight:950;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em}.cfv-metric strong{display:block;margin-top:7px;font-size:25px;letter-spacing:-.06em;line-height:1;color:var(--cfv-text)}.cfv-metric .hint{margin-top:5px;color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:11px;line-height:1.3}.cfv-search{position:relative}.cfv-search input{width:100%;height:50px;border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);background:var(--cfv-card-soft);color:var(--cfv-text);border-radius:18px;outline:none;padding:0 16px 0 42px}.cfv-search span{position:absolute;left:16px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--cfv-muted-2)}.cfv-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:34px minmax(0,1.35fr) minmax(130px,.45fr) minmax(180px,.7fr) 40px;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:13px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--cfv-line);background:rgba(16,20,18,.56)}.cfv-row:first-child{border-top:0}.cfv-index{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:11px;display:grid;place-items:center;background:var(--cfv-card-soft);color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:11px;font-weight:950}.cfv-name{color:var(--cfv-text);font-weight:950;letter-spacing:-.025em;line-height:1.2}.cfv-sub{color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:4px;line-height:1.35}.cfv-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;height:24px;padding:0 9px;border-radius:999px;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;background:var(--cfv-card-soft);color:var(--cfv-muted);white-space:nowrap;border:1px solid var(--cfv-line)}.cfv-pill-blue{background:var(--cfv-accent-soft);color:#d8fff1;border-color:var(--cfv-accent-2)}.cfv-statusline{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:8px}.cfv-person-card{padding:18px;display:grid;gap:15px}.cfv-avatar-line{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}.cfv-avatar{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cfv-sidebar),var(--cfv-accent));color:var(--cfv-text);display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:950;letter-spacing:-.05em}.cfv-kv{display:grid;gap:8px}.cfv-kv-row{padding:11px 12px;border-radius:15px;border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);background:var(--cfv-card-soft);display:grid;gap:4px}.cfv-kv-row label{color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;font-weight:950}.cfv-kv-row strong{color:var(--cfv-text);font-size:13px;word-break:break-word}.cfv-hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.35fr) minmax(240px,.65fr);gap:14px}.cfv-hero{min-height:156px;border-radius:var(--cfv-radius-xl);padding:18px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cfv-sidebar),var(--cfv-accent-soft));border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);color:var(--cfv-text);display:grid;align-content:space-between;box-shadow:var(--cfv-shadow)}.cfv-hero-light{background:rgba(16,20,18,.9);box-shadow:var(--cfv-shadow-soft)}.cfv-hero label{color:var(--cfv-muted-2);font-size:10px;font-weight:950;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}.cfv-hero h2{margin:8px 0 6px;font-size:27px;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.06em;color:var(--cfv-text)}.cfv-hero p{margin:0;color:var(--cfv-muted);font-size:13px;line-height:1.45}.cfv-right-card{padding:16px;border-radius:var(--cfv-radius-xl);background:rgba(16,20,18,.9);border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);box-shadow:var(--cfv-shadow-soft)}.cfv-quick-list{display:grid;gap:8px}.cfv-quick-list button{min-height:40px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--cfv-line);background:var(--cfv-card-soft);color:var(--cfv-text);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 12px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:900}

- 4: scope: scoped fixes only. New entries must include owner, reason, scope, remove_after_stage.
- 5: remove_after_stage: each entry below defines its own removal stage.
- 12: remove_after_stage: after right rail wrapper component contract is shipped.
- 20: remove_after_stage: after AI drafts right rail uses component contract.
- 28: remove_after_stage: after AI drafts right rail patches are consolidated.
- 36: remove_after_stage: after admin feedback module receives stable page adapter.
- 44: remove_after_stage: after client event modal component contract.
- 52: remove_after_stage: after client detail visual contract consolidation.
- 60: remove_after_stage: after client warning strip rendering is fixed in JSX.
- 63: display: none !important;
- 70: remove_after_stage: after right rail quick filters are rebuilt on shared SurfaceCard/ListRow contracts.

- 20: const FULL_CLOSEFLOW_HTML = "<!doctype html>\n<html lang=\"pl\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"utf-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\" />\n  <title>CloseFlow - pełny kierunek UI</title>\n  <style>\n    :root {\n      --bg: #f4f6f8;\n      --bg-2: #eef2f6;\n      --sidebar: #101828;\n      --sidebar-2: #172033;\n      --card: #ffffff;\n      --card-soft: #f8fafc;\n      --text: #111827;\n      --muted: #667085;\n      --muted-2: #98a2b3;\n      --line: #e4e7ec;\n      --line-2: #d0d5dd;\n      --blue: #2563eb;\n      --blue-2: #1d4ed8;\n      --blue-soft: #eff6ff;\n      --green: #047857;\n      --green-soft: #ecfdf3;\n      --red: #b42318;\n      --red-soft: #fff1f3;\n      --amber: #b54708;\n      --amber-soft: #fffaeb;\n      --violet: #6941c6;\n      --violet-soft: #f4f3ff;\n      --shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(16, 24, 40, .08);\n      --shadow-soft: 0 8px 22px rgba(16, 24, 40, .05);\n      --radius-xl: 28px;\n      --radius-lg: 20px;\n      --radius-md: 14px;\n    }\n\n    * { box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n    body {\n      margin: 0;\n      min-height: 100vh;\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(circle at 16% 0%, rgba(37, 99, 235, .10), transparent 28%),\n        radial-gradient(circle at 95% 7%, rgba(16, 24, 40, .08), transparent 26%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, #f7f9fc 0%, var(--bg) 34%, #eef2f6 100%);\n      color: var(--text);\n      font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, \"Segoe UI\", sans-serif;\n      font-size: 14px;\n    }\n\n    button,\n    input,\n    textarea,\n    select {\n      font: inherit;\n    }\n\n    a {\n      color: inherit;\n      text-decoration: none;\n    }\n\n    .app {\n      min-height: 100vh;\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 286px minmax(0, 1fr);\n    }\n\n    .sidebar {\n      position: sticky;\n      top: 0;\n      height: 100vh;\n      padding: 18px;\n      background:\n        radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%, rgba(37, 99, 235, .26), transparent 35%),\n        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--sidebar) 0%, #0b1220 100%);\n      color: #fff;\n      display: flex;\n      flex-direction: column;\n      gap: 16px;\n      z-index: 10;\n      box-shadow: 18px 0 45px rgba(16, 24, 40, .16);\n    }\n\n    .brand {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 12px;\n      padding: 8px 8px 14px;\n      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n    }\n\n    .brand-logo {\n      width: 44px;\n      height: 44px;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      border-radius: 16px;\n      background: #fff;\n      color: #0f172a;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: -.05em;\n      box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.24);\n    }\n\n    .brand-title {\n      min-width: 0;\n    }\n\n    .brand-title strong {\n      display: block;\n      font-size: 16px;\n      letter-spacing: -.04em;\n    }\n\n    .brand-title span {\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 2px;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.54);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n    }\n\n    .nav-scroll {\n      overflow: auto;\n      padding-right: 2px;\n      flex: 1;\n    }\n\n    .nav-group {\n      margin-top: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .nav-group:first-child {\n      margin-top: 0;\n    }\n\n    .nav-caption {\n      padding: 0 10px 7px;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.38);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn {\n      width: 100%;\n      min-height: 43px;\n      border: 0;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      background: transparent;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.68);\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      padding: 0 11px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-size: 13px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n      transition: .16s ease;\n      text-align: left;\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn:hover {\n      color: #fff;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn.active {\n      color: #fff;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);\n      box-shadow:\n        inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.10),\n        0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.16);\n    }\n\n    .nav-ico {\n      width: 28px;\n      height: 28px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.07);\n      font-size: 14px;\n      flex: 0 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .nav-btn.active .nav-ico {\n      background: #fff;\n      color: #0f172a;\n    }\n\n    .nav-badge {\n      margin-left: auto;\n      min-width: 22px;\n      height: 20px;\n      padding: 0 7px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.10);\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.7);\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n    }\n\n    .sidebar-footer {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 10px;\n      padding-top: 12px;\n      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n    }\n\n    .trial-card {\n      padding: 12px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);\n      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);\n    }\n\n    .trial-card .top {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 10px;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.75);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .06em;\n    }\n\n    .bar {\n      height: 7px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);\n      margin-top: 10px;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .bar span {\n      display: block;\n      height: 100%;\n      border-radius: inherit;\n      background: #60a5fa;\n    }\n\n    .user-card {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      padding: 9px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.06);\n    }\n\n    .user-avatar {\n      width: 38px;\n      height: 38px;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .user-card strong {\n      display: block;\n      font-size: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .user-card span {\n      display: block;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.5);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      margin-top: 2px;\n    }\n\n    .main {\n      min-width: 0;\n      padding: 24px 28px 48px;\n    }\n\n    .global-bar {\n      position: sticky;\n      top: 0;\n      z-index: 8;\n      margin: -24px -28px 22px;\n      padding: 13px 28px;\n      background: rgba(247, 249, 252, .86);\n      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(228, 231, 236, .78);\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .global-title {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n      min-width: 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n    }\n\n    .global-title strong {\n      color: var(--text);\n    }\n\n    .global-actions {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: flex-end;\n      gap: 8px;\n      overflow-x: auto;\n      padding-bottom: 1px;\n    }\n\n    .view {\n      display: none;\n      max-width: 1500px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .view.active {\n      display: block;\n      animation: fade .16s ease-out;\n    }\n\n    @keyframes fade {\n      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); }\n      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n    }\n\n    .page-head {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 22px;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .kicker {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 7px;\n      padding: 5px 9px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.72);\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n    }\n\n    h1 {\n      margin: 8px 0 0;\n      font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 42px);\n      line-height: 1;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .lead-copy {\n      margin: 8px 0 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      max-width: 780px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n      font-size: 13px;\n    }\n\n    .head-actions {\n      display: flex;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      justify-content: flex-end;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .btn {\n      min-height: 40px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card);\n      color: var(--text);\n      border-radius: 13px;\n      padding: 0 14px;\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      gap: 7px;\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      transition: .15s ease;\n      white-space: nowrap;\n    }\n\n    .btn:hover {\n      transform: translateY(-1px);\n      border-color: var(--line-2);\n    }\n\n    .btn.primary {\n      background: var(--blue);\n      border-color: var(--blue);\n      color: #fff;\n      box-shadow: 0 13px 26px rgba(37, 99, 235, .23);\n    }\n\n    .btn.dark {\n      background: var(--sidebar);\n      border-color: var(--sidebar);\n      color: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .btn.ghost {\n      box-shadow: none;\n      background: transparent;\n    }\n\n    .btn.soft-blue {\n      color: var(--blue-2);\n      background: var(--blue-soft);\n      border-color: #bfdbfe;\n      box-shadow: none;\n    }\n\n    .btn.soft-red {\n      color: var(--red);\n      background: var(--red-soft);\n      border-color: #fecdd3;\n      box-shadow: none;\n    }\n\n    .grid-4 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 13px;\n    }\n\n    .grid-5 {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 13px;\n    }\n\n    .metric {\n      min-height: 106px;\n      border-radius: 22px;\n      padding: 16px;\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.82);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      display: grid;\n      align-content: space-between;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      transition: .16s ease;\n    }\n\n    .metric:hover {\n      transform: translateY(-2px);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    }\n\n    .metric.active {\n      background: var(--blue-soft);\n      border-color: #93c5fd;\n    }\n\n    .metric label {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n    }\n\n    .metric strong {\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 7px;\n      font-size: 25px;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n      line-height: 1;\n    }\n\n    .metric .hint {\n      margin-top: 5px;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      line-height: 1.3;\n    }\n\n    .card {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .card.pad {\n      padding: 18px;\n    }\n\n    .panel-head {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 12px;\n      margin-bottom: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .panel-head h2,\n    .panel-head h3 {\n      margin: 0;\n      font-size: 15px;\n      letter-spacing: -.03em;\n    }\n\n    .panel-head p {\n      margin: 4px 0 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      line-height: 1.4;\n    }\n\n    .layout-list {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 315px;\n      gap: 17px;\n      align-items: start;\n      margin-top: 17px;\n    }\n\n    .layout-detail {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 300px minmax(0, 1fr) 315px;\n      gap: 17px;\n      align-items: start;\n      margin-top: 17px;\n    }\n\n    .stack {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .search {\n      position: relative;\n    }\n\n    .search input {\n      width: 100%;\n      height: 50px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      outline: none;\n      padding: 0 16px 0 42px;\n      color: var(--text);\n      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.7);\n    }\n\n    .search span {\n      position: absolute;\n      left: 16px;\n      top: 50%;\n      transform: translateY(-50%);\n      color: var(--muted-2);\n      font-size: 15px;\n    }\n\n    .table-card {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.84);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .row {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 34px minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(130px, .45fr) minmax(180px, .7fr) 40px;\n      gap: 12px;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding: 13px 14px;\n      border-top: 1px solid var(--line);\n      transition: .15s ease;\n    }\n\n    .row:first-child {\n      border-top: 0;\n    }\n\n    .row:hover {\n      background: #fff;\n    }\n\n    .row.slim {\n      grid-template-columns: 34px minmax(0, 1fr) 140px 120px;\n    }\n\n    .index {\n      width: 28px;\n      height: 28px;\n      border-radius: 11px;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      background: #f2f4f7;\n      color: #667085;\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n    }\n\n    .title {\n      color: var(--text);\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: -.025em;\n      line-height: 1.2;\n    }\n\n    .sub {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      margin-top: 4px;\n      line-height: 1.35;\n    }\n\n    .mini {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 11px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n    }\n\n    .pill {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 5px;\n      height: 24px;\n      padding: 0 9px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      font-size: 11px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      background: #f2f4f7;\n      color: #475467;\n      white-space: nowrap;\n      border: 1px solid transparent;\n    }\n\n    .pill.blue { background: var(--blue-soft); color: var(--blue-2); border-color: #bfdbfe; }\n    .pill.green { background: var(--green-soft); color: var(--green); border-color: #bbf7d0; }\n    .pill.red { background: var(--red-soft); color: var(--red); border-color: #fecdd3; }\n    .pill.amber { background: var(--amber-soft); color: var(--amber); border-color: #fedf89; }\n    .pill.violet { background: var(--violet-soft); color: var(--violet); border-color: #ddd6fe; }\n    .pill.dark { background: var(--sidebar); color: #fff; }\n\n    .statusline {\n      display: flex;\n      flex-wrap: wrap;\n      gap: 6px;\n      margin-top: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .person-card {\n      padding: 18px;\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 15px;\n    }\n\n    .avatar-line {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .avatar {\n      width: 54px;\n      height: 54px;\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      background: var(--sidebar);\n      color: #fff;\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: -.05em;\n      box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(16, 24, 40, .18);\n    }\n\n    .avatar.blue {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1d4ed8, #60a5fa);\n    }\n\n    .avatar.green {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #047857, #34d399);\n    }\n\n    .avatar.violet {\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5b21b6, #a78bfa);\n    }\n\n    .avatar-line h2 {\n      margin: 0;\n      font-size: 18px;\n      letter-spacing: -.04em;\n    }\n\n    .avatar-line p {\n      margin: 3px 0 0;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      line-height: 1.35;\n    }\n\n    .kv {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .kv-row {\n      padding: 11px 12px;\n      border-radius: 15px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 4px;\n    }\n\n    .kv-row label {\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n      letter-spacing: .07em;\n      font-weight: 950;\n    }\n\n    .kv-row strong {\n      color: var(--text);\n      font-size: 13px;\n      word-break: break-word;\n    }\n\n    .hero-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.35fr) minmax(240px, .65fr);\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .hero {\n      min-height: 156px;\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      padding: 18px;\n      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #111827, #1d2939);\n      color: #fff;\n      display: grid;\n      align-content: space-between;\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow);\n    }\n\n    .hero.light {\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      color: var(--text);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n    }\n\n    .hero label {\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.62);\n      font-size: 10px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      letter-spacing: .08em;\n      text-transform: uppercase;\n    }\n\n    .hero.light label {\n      color: var(--muted);\n    }\n\n    .hero h2 {\n      margin: 8px 0 6px;\n      font-size: 27px;\n      line-height: 1.05;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .hero p {\n      margin: 0;\n      color: rgba(255,255,255,.72);\n      font-size: 13px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n    }\n\n    .hero.light p {\n      color: var(--muted);\n    }\n\n    .tabs {\n      display: inline-flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 6px;\n      padding: 6px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      background: rgba(248,250,252,.86);\n      width: fit-content;\n    }\n\n    .tabs button {\n      border: 0;\n      background: transparent;\n      color: var(--muted);\n      border-radius: 12px;\n      padding: 9px 13px;\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      cursor: pointer;\n    }\n\n    .tabs button.active {\n      background: #fff;\n      color: var(--text);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n    }\n\n    .work-card {\n      padding: 14px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 9px;\n    }\n\n    .work-head {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 12px;\n      align-items: flex-start;\n    }\n\n    .progress {\n      height: 9px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: #e4e7ec;\n      overflow: hidden;\n    }\n\n    .progress span {\n      display: block;\n      height: 100%;\n      border-radius: inherit;\n      background: var(--blue);\n    }\n\n    .right-card {\n      padding: 16px;\n      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);\n      background: rgba(255,255,255,.86);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n    }\n\n    .quick-list {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .quick-list button,\n    .quick-list a {\n      min-height: 40px;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: #fff;\n      color: #344054;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      padding: 0 12px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-size: 12px;\n      font-weight: 900;\n      transition: .15s ease;\n    }\n\n    .quick-list button:hover,\n    .quick-list a:hover {\n      border-color: #bfdbfe;\n      background: var(--blue-soft);\n      color: var(--blue-2);\n    }\n\n    .note {\n      border-radius: 18px;\n      padding: 14px;\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border: 1px dashed var(--line-2);\n      color: var(--muted);\n      font-size: 12px;\n      line-height: 1.45;\n    }\n\n    .mini-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .mini-card {\n      min-height: 108px;\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      padding: 14px;\n      display: grid;\n      align-content: space-between;\n    }\n\n    .mini-card strong {\n      display: block;\n      margin-top: 8px;\n      font-size: 23px;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .calendar-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 260px minmax(0, 1fr);\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .month-list {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n    }\n\n    .day-card {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);\n      gap: 12px;\n      padding: 12px;\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      margin-top: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .day {\n      height: 58px;\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      background: #fff;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      display: grid;\n      place-items: center;\n      font-weight: 950;\n      color: var(--text);\n      text-align: center;\n      line-height: 1.1;\n    }\n\n    .settings-grid {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .switch-row {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      gap: 12px;\n      padding: 13px;\n      border-radius: 17px;\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      margin-top: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .switch {\n      width: 42px;\n      height: 24px;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      background: var(--blue);\n      position: relative;\n      flex: 0 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .switch::after {\n      content: \"\";\n      width: 18px;\n      height: 18px;\n      background: #fff;\n      border-radius: 999px;\n      position: absolute;\n      right: 3px;\n      top: 3px;\n      box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.18);\n    }\n\n    .drawer-backdrop {\n      position: fixed;\n      inset: 0;\n      background: rgba(16, 24, 40, .44);\n      display: none;\n      z-index: 50;\n    }\n\n    .drawer-backdrop.open {\n      display: block;\n    }\n\n    .drawer {\n      position: fixed;\n      top: 0;\n      right: 0;\n      width: min(480px, 100vw);\n      height: 100vh;\n      background: #fff;\n      border-left: 1px solid var(--line);\n      box-shadow: -28px 0 90px rgba(16,24,40,.28);\n      transform: translateX(102%);\n      transition: .2s ease;\n      z-index: 51;\n      padding: 22px;\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;\n      gap: 16px;\n    }\n\n    .drawer.open {\n      transform: translateX(0);\n    }\n\n    .drawer h2 {\n      margin: 0;\n      font-size: 24px;\n      letter-spacing: -.06em;\n    }\n\n    .drawer textarea {\n      width: 100%;\n      min-height: 180px;\n      resize: vertical;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      border-radius: 20px;\n      padding: 14px;\n      outline: none;\n      color: var(--text);\n    }\n\n    .suggestions {\n      display: grid;\n      gap: 8px;\n      margin-top: 12px;\n    }\n\n    .suggestions button {\n      text-align: left;\n      min-height: 40px;\n      border-radius: 14px;\n      border: 1px solid var(--line);\n      background: var(--card-soft);\n      color: #344054;\n      padding: 10px 12px;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-size: 13px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n    }\n\n    .mobile-top {\n      display: none;\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 1220px) {\n      .app {\n        grid-template-columns: 86px minmax(0,1fr);\n      }\n\n      .sidebar {\n        padding: 14px 10px;\n      }\n\n      .brand-title,\n      .nav-caption,\n      .nav-label,\n      .nav-badge,\n      .sidebar-footer {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .brand {\n        justify-content: center;\n        padding: 8px 0 14px;\n      }\n\n      .nav-btn {\n        justify-content: center;\n        padding: 0;\n      }\n\n      .nav-ico {\n        width: 38px;\n        height: 38px;\n      }\n\n      .layout-detail,\n      .layout-list {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n\n      .grid-5 {\n        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      }\n\n      .grid-4 {\n        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n      }\n\n      .calendar-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n    }\n\n    @media (max-width: 760px) {\n      .app {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n\n      .sidebar {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .mobile-top {\n        display: flex;\n        position: sticky;\n        top: 0;\n        z-index: 15;\n        align-items: center;\n        justify-content: space-between;\n        padding: 12px 14px;\n        background: rgba(255,255,255,.9);\n        backdrop-filter: blur(16px);\n        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);\n      }\n\n      .main {\n        padding: 0 14px 94px;\n      }\n\n      .global-bar {\n        top: 0;\n        margin: 0 -14px 16px;\n        padding: 10px 14px;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n      }\n\n      .global-title {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .page-head {\n        flex-direction: column;\n        gap: 12px;\n      }\n\n      .head-actions {\n        justify-content: flex-start;\n        width: 100%;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n      }\n\n      h1 {\n        font-size: 29px;\n      }\n\n      .grid-5,\n      .grid-4,\n      .mini-grid,\n      .settings-grid,\n      .hero-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      }\n\n      .row,\n      .row.slim {\n        grid-template-columns: 30px minmax(0, 1fr);\n      }\n\n      .row > :nth-child(n+4),\n      .row.slim > :nth-child(n+4) {\n        display: none;\n      }\n\n      .tabs {\n        width: 100%;\n        overflow-x: auto;\n      }\n\n      .mobile-nav = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-view]'));\n    const views = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.view'));\n\n    function showView(id) {\n      views.forEach(view => view.classList.toggle('active', view.id === id));\n      allButtons.forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.view === id));\n      window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });\n    }\n\n    allButtons.forEach(btn => {\n      btn.addEventListener('click', () => showView(btn.dataset.view));\n    });\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('[data-jump]').forEach(el => {\n      el.addEventListener('click', event => {\n        event.preventDefault();\n        showView(el.dataset.jump);\n      });\n    });\n\n    const drawer = document.getElementById('aiDrawer');\n    const backdrop = document.getElementById('drawerBackdrop');\n    const close = document.getElementById('drawerClose');\n    const title = document.getElementById('drawerTitle');\n    const prompt = document.getElementById('aiPrompt');\n    const suggestions = document.getElementById('suggestions');\n\n    const titleMap = {\n      global: 'Zapytaj AI w aplikacji',\n      today: 'Zapytaj AI o dzień',\n      leads: 'Zapytaj AI o leady',\n      lead: 'Zapytaj AI o tego leada',\n      clients: 'Zapytaj AI o klientów',\n      client: 'Zapytaj AI o klienta',\n      cases: 'Zapytaj AI o sprawy',\n      case: 'Zapytaj AI o sprawę',\n      tasks: 'Zapytaj AI o zadania',\n      calendar: 'Zapytaj AI o kalendarz',\n      activity: 'Szukaj w aktywności',\n      drafts: 'Zapytaj o szkice AI',\n      help: 'Pomoc AI'\n    };\n\n    const suggestionMap = {\n      global: ['Co mam teraz zrobić najpierw?', 'Znajdź telefon klienta Alfred Panek.', 'Pokaż rzeczy bez następnego kroku.', 'Zapisz szkic zadania z tego tekstu.'],\n      today: ['Co jest dziś najpilniejsze?', 'Pokaż zaległe zadania.', 'Które sprawy stoją bez ruchu?', 'Ułóż plan dnia w kolejności.'],\n      leads: ['Które leady są bez działania?', 'Pokaż najbardziej wartościowe relacje.', 'Który lead wymaga reakcji?', 'Napisz follow-up do wybranego leada.'],\n      lead: ['Co powinienem zrobić dalej z tym leadem?', 'Napisz krótką odpowiedź.', 'Czy warto przenieść do obsługi?', 'Zaproponuj następne zadanie.'],\n      clients: ['Którzy klienci nie mają aktywnej sprawy?', 'Znajdź klientów bez ruchu.', 'Pokaż klientów z największą wartością.', 'Podsumuj relacje.'],\n      client: ['Podsumuj historię klienta.', 'Znajdź ostatnie ustalenia.', 'Czy klient ma aktywne blokery?', 'Wypisz powiązane sprawy i leady.'],\n      cases: ['Które sprawy stoją?', 'Pokaż sprawy czekające na klienta.', 'Która sprawa wymaga akcji?', 'Podsumuj aktywne sprawy.'],\n      case: ['Co blokuje tę sprawę?', 'Podsumuj sprawę w 5 punktach.', 'Napisz wiadomość do klienta o brakach.', 'Jaki jest następny najlepszy ruch?'],\n      tasks: ['Pokaż zadania zaległe.', 'Ułóż zadania według priorytetu.', 'Które zadania są bez terminu?', 'Dodaj zadanie z opisu.'],\n      calendar: ['Co mam w tym tygodniu?', 'Pokaż wolne okna.', 'Które wydarzenia są powiązane ze sprawami?', 'Przesuń wydarzenie na jutro.'],\n      activity: ['Znajdź ostatnie zmiany w sprawie Alfreda.', 'Pokaż aktywność AI.', 'Co zmieniło się dziś?', 'Znajdź usunięte zadania.'],\n      drafts: ['Które szkice wymagają decyzji?', 'Popraw ten szkic.', 'Zamień szkic na zadanie.', 'Odrzuć szkice bez danych.'],\n      help: ['Jak działa ścieżka lead klient sprawa?', 'Jak dodać zadanie z głosu?', 'Jak działa AI bez automatycznego zapisu?', 'Jak uruchomić digest?']\n    };\n\n    function openDrawer(context) {\n      title.textContent = titleMap[context] || 'Zapytaj AI';\n      prompt.value = '';\n      suggestions.innerHTML = '';\n      (suggestionMap[context] || suggestionMap.global).forEach(text => {\n        const btn = document.createElement('button');\n        btn.textContent = text;\n        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n          prompt.value = text;\n          prompt.focus();\n        });\n        suggestions.appendChild(btn);\n      });\n      drawer.classList.add('open');\n      backdrop.classList.add('open');\n    }\n\n    function closeDrawer() {\n      drawer.classList.remove('open');\n      backdrop.classList.remove('open');\n    }\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('.ai-open').forEach(btn => {\n      btn.addEventListener('click', () => openDrawer(btn.dataset.context || 'global'));\n    });\n\n    close.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);\n    backdrop.addEventListener('click', closeDrawer);\n    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {\n      if (e.key === 'Escape') closeDrawer();\n    });\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n";
